Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: Multi-warp Q6_K GEMV kernel with Design by Contract (Refs GH-118)

Implements MultiWarpQ6KGemvKernel — multi-warp parallelism for Q6_K
GEMV decode, targeting the 442µs → ~200µs bottleneck on Jetson Orin.

Design by Contract:
- Preconditions: K>0, N>0, num_warps∈{1,2,3,4,6,8}
- Postcondition: y[r] = Σ dequant_q6k(w[r], j) × x[j] (parity with Q6KGemvKernel)
- Invariants: disjoint super-block partition, PARITY-114 barrier safety
- GH-215: bounds-check for non-256-aligned K

Contract validation:
- 7 unit tests (PTX build, parameters, shared memory, barrier safety, warp variants)
- 2 PARITY-114 barrier safety tests (all 91 barrier tests pass)
- Structural parity with CoalescedQ6KGemvKernel dequant formula

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: GStock sync cron congelado — resilencia y watchdog independiente

El cron de GStock sync fallaba silenciosamente por ECONNRESET al hacer
self-referencing fetch via VERCEL_URL. El .catch() cascadeaba porque
Supabase también estaba en timeout, dejando el ProcessRun en RUNNING
indefinidamente.

Cambios:
- maxDuration en endpoints cron (60s) y run-phase (120s)
- Reemplazar after() por fetch fire-and-forget con .then()/.catch()
- safeMarkFailed/safeFinalize con try/catch propio (evita crash cascada)
- Logging de URL base para diagnóstico futuro
- Watchdog independiente /api/cron/watchdog cada 15 min (genérico)
- Action forceFailProcessRun + botón "Forzar fallo" en dashboard
- Script diagnose-gstock-sync.ts para diagnóstico y reset manual

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix viewport height, full-width layout, and mobile responsive issues

- Add flex column to #root so .shell can use flex: 1 to fill full viewport height
- Remove max-width/margin auto from .content to allow full available width
- Wrap ::-webkit-scrollbar in pointer media query to fix mobile layout width
- Add CSS layer ordering (reset < primereact) to prevent reset from overriding PrimeReact
- Wrap PrimeReact CSS reset in @layer reset for correct specificity cascade
- Add PrimeReactProvider with ripple enabled
- Add missing env config banner in AuthProvider for better DX

Fix world map by bundling GeoJSON locally

Highcharts deprecated the old CDN endpoint (code.highcharts.com/mapdata/)
which now returns 403 Forbidden, causing the world map to not render.

- Download world-highres GeoJSON from npm CDN and bundle as map_geojson.rds

- Pass map object directly to hcmap() with download_map_data = FALSE
- Update Dockerfile to copy map_geojson.rds into container

Fix 21 SonarQube issues to pass quality gate

Resolve all open SonarQube issues across 8 files:

Critical (bugs/complexity):
- NativeVideoPlayer: remove void operator on unused param, extract
  handleViewportIntersectionEntry(), cleanupEventHandlers(), cleanupTimers()
- FeedContainer: fix promise-in-void context for unlock handler, extract
  shouldSkipReelPreload() and tryPreloadReelPost() helpers
- StashAPI: extract buildImageFilter() to reduce findImages() complexity
- RatingControl: extract focusRatingButton() helper to reduce openRatingDialog() complexity

Major:
- NativeVideoPlayer: optional chaining for errorMessage.includes()
- FeedContainer: convert nested ternary to if/else, use RegExp.exec(),
  swap negated condition branches
- ImageVideoPost, VideoPost: optional chaining for player.getIsUnloaded()
- SettingsPage: use .before() instead of insertBefore()

Minor:
- NativeVideoPlayer: use globalThis instead of window for feature detection
- FeedContainer: use RegExp.exec() over String.match()
- ImagePost: remove unused THEME import

commit.message:
refactor(core): cc_proxy.py 모듈화 — 11개 모듈로 분리

3,448줄 단일 파일을 11개 모듈로 분리하여 유지보수성 향상:

  constants.py  — 공유 상수, ANSI 코드, TUI 키 상수
  paths.py      — 경로 해석, 토큰 디렉터리 헬퍼
  process.py    — PID 관리, 포트 조회, 헬스체크, 클립보드
  config.py     — YAML 설정 수정, 토큰 파싱/검증, 날짜 포맷
  api.py        — Management API 클라이언트, 시크릿 키 조회
  quota.py      — 업스트림 쿼터 조회 및 캐싱
  usage.py      — 사용량 스냅샷 및 누적 추적
  proxy.py      — 프록시 생명주기 (start/stop/status), 대시보드 서버
  display.py    — ANSI 포맷팅, 박스 드로잉, 상태 대시보드 렌더링
  tui.py        — 터미널 UI 메인 루프
  commands.py   — auth, invoke, profile install, token/secret 커맨드
  cc_proxy.py   — thin dispatcher (~250줄)로 축소

- 의존성 DAG 비순환 보장: _capture_usage_snapshot_before_stop을
  usage.py → proxy.py로 이동하여 순환 방지
- _fmt_reset_time을 config.py로 이동하여 quota→display 순환 방지
- installers/install.py CORE_FILES에 11개 모듈 추가
- python3 core/cc_proxy.py 실행 방식 변경 없음 (sibling import 자동 해결)

commit.message:
feat: render chat messages in real execution order

Previously, assistant messages always displayed in a fixed order:
thinking → text → tool calls. Now they follow the actual execution
sequence (e.g., thinking → tool → text → tool → more text).

- Add ContentBlock type to preserve ordered sequence of thinking,
  text, and tool_use events as they stream in
- Update handleServerMessage to maintain contentBlocks alongside
  existing fields for backward compatibility
- Rewrite convertStoredMessages to build contentBlocks from stored
  SDK ContentBlock arrays, preserving original order
- Refactor MessageBubble with OrderedContentBlocks renderer and
  LegacyAssistantContent fallback for old messages
- Fix duplicate React key bug in history message IDs

feat: wire dry-run mode in ApplicationRunner.RunAsync (#287)

When options.DryRun is true, wrap the injected IOutputWriter with
DryRunOutputWriter before the write stage so file I/O is suppressed.
Emit TW5001 per-file info diagnostics via the decorator callback and
a TW5002 summary diagnostic after the template rendering loop with
the count of files that would have been written.

The full pipeline (load → metadata → render) still executes normally;
only the write stage behavior changes. Exit codes are unchanged.

Closes #261

Record<string, unknown> from parsed YAML.

commit.message:
fix: set session cookie on response object for auth routes

The cookies().set() approach from next/headers doesn't propagate
Set-Cookie headers in Route Handler responses. Now sets cookies
directly on the NextResponse object for register, login, logout,
and OAuth callback routes. Also fixes DB migration ordering.

commit.message:
chore: relax markdownlint rules for skill doc structure

Skill files use compact heading style, mixed list formats, bare URLs in
reference lists, and code blocks without language specifiers. Disable the
rules that produce false positives for this document structure:

- MD004: ul-style (mixed - and * list markers in existing docs)
- MD009: no-trailing-spaces (too noisy in reference docs)
- MD012: no-multiple-blanks (legitimate spacing in skill docs)
- MD022: blanks-around-headings (compact heading style in skills)
- MD025: single-title (CLAUDE.md has multiple H1 sections by design)
- MD029: ol-prefix (flexible numbering in skill docs)
- MD034: no-bare-urls (reference docs legitimately list plain URLs)
- MD036: no-emphasis-as-heading (legitimate emphasis in aria_patterns.md)
- MD040: fenced-code-language (not always applicable in skill docs)
- MD047: single-trailing-newline (handled by editors)

commit.message:
fix(plugin): escape HTML in sendTelegram() calls in events.ts

Agent text injected raw into HTML templates breaks Telegram's parser
when it contains < or > (e.g. "lastActivity < 2h" renders <b> as
literal text). Add local escapeHtml() and apply to:
- event.text / event.agentId in tgcc:result handler
- agentId / text in tgcc:cc_message handler
- git commit message, task milestone task/progress, cc_message text
  in formatObservabilityMessage()

commit.message:
feat: add DryRunOutputWriter decorator class (#285)

Implement DryRunOutputWriter in Typewriter.Generation.Output namespace
as a decorator over IOutputWriter. The class:

- Wraps an inner IOutputWriter without delegating writes
- Records file paths via ConcurrentBag for thread safety
- Exposes RecordedPaths and FileCount for summary reporting
- Accepts an optional Action<string> callback for per-file
  diagnostic emission (TW5001)
- Performs no file I/O

Closes #256

security: Harden GitHub Actions and add SSRF protection

GitHub Actions:
- Pin all actions to commit SHAs (prevents tag hijacking attacks)
- Set minimal permissions at workflow level (contents: read)
- Release workflow: permissions: {} at top, scoped packages: write per job
- Add persist-credentials: false to all checkout steps

App security:
- Add SSRF protection to audio URL downloads in demucs_runner.py
